# nomad_scheduler_config (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "nomad_scheduler_config" "global" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `memory_oversubscription_enabled` (Boolean) When true, tasks may exceed their reserved memory limit.
- `preemption_config` (Map of Boolean) Options to enable preemption for various schedulers.
- `scheduler_algorithm` (String) Specifies whether scheduler binpacks or spreads allocations on available nodes.
